Source: bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-reverse-geocoding-request.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - ReverseGeocodingRequest
 *
 * Typed request for `bemap.ReverseGeocoder.revGeo(request)` and for the
 * convenience alias `bemap.Geocoder.reverseGeocode(coord, radius, opts)`.
 *
 * Wire shape mirrors the BeMap server contract (cross-checked against
 * `bemap-flutter-api/lib/service/reverse_geocoding/model/request/rev_geo_request.dart`).
 * Endpoint: `POST service/geocoding/1.0/reverse`.
 *
 * Required wire fields: `coordinateSat`, `radius`.
 *
 * Note on wire spelling: the server field is `maximunResult` (with the
 * typo). The JS API exposes the constructor field as the typo-free
 * `maxResult` for ergonomics and translates at serialisation time.
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 * @public
 * @constructor
 * @param {Object} [options]
 * @param {bemap.CoordinateSat|bemap.Coordinate|Object} [options.coordinate]   Mandatory in practice.
 * @param {Number} [options.radius=50]            Search radius in metres.
 * @param {String} [options.transportMode]        One of `bemap.TransportMode.*`. Defaults to CAR.
 * @param {Number} [options.maxResult=1]          Maximum number of items returned.
 * @param {String} [options.language]             ISO 639-1 language code.
 * @param {Array.<String>} [options.options]      Subset of `bemap.RevGeocodingOptions.*` (sent as JSON array).
 * @param {String} [options.geoserver]
 * @param {Number} [options.switchIndex]
 */
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest = function(options) {
    var opts = options || {};

    this.coordinate = bemap.RoutingDestination._coerceCoordinateSat(opts.coordinate);
    this.radius = (typeof opts.radius === 'number') ? opts.radius : 50;
    this.transportMode = opts.transportMode || null;
    this.maxResult = (typeof opts.maxResult === 'number') ? opts.maxResult : 1;
    this.language = opts.language || null;
    this.options = Array.isArray(opts.options) ? opts.options.slice() : null;
    this.geoserver = opts.geoserver || null;
    this.switchIndex = (typeof opts.switchIndex === 'number') ? opts.switchIndex : null;
};

bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setCoordinate = function(v) {
    this.coordinate = bemap.RoutingDestination._coerceCoordinateSat(v);
    return this;
};
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setRadius = function(v) { this.radius = v; return this; };
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setTransportMode = function(v) { this.transportMode = v; return this; };
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setMaxResult = function(v) { this.maxResult = v; return this; };
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setLanguage = function(v) { this.language = v; return this; };
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setOptions = function(v) {
    this.options = Array.isArray(v) ? v.slice() : null;
    return this;
};
bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.setGeoserver = function(g) { this.geoserver = g; return this; };

bemap.ReverseGeocodingRequest.prototype.toJson = function() {
    var body = {};
    if (this.coordinate) body.coordinateSat = this.coordinate.toJson();
    body.radius = this.radius;
    if (this.transportMode) body.transportMode = this.transportMode;
    if (this.maxResult !== null) body.maximunResult = this.maxResult;
    if (this.language) body.language = this.language;
    if (this.options && this.options.length) body.options = this.options.slice();
    if (this.geoserver) body.geoserver = this.geoserver;
    if (this.switchIndex !== null) body.switchIndex = this.switchIndex;
    return body;
};
